entries.text: Table orders: Records of all orders placed.. Columns: OrderID INT, CustomerID VARCHAR, EmployeeID INT, OrderDate DATE, RequiredDate DATE, ShippedDate DATE, ShipVia INT, Freight DECIMAL, ShipName VARCHAR, ShipAddress VARCHAR, ShipCity VARCHAR, ShipRegion VARCHAR, ShipPostalCode VARCHAR, ShipCountry VARCHAR

Table customers: Information about customers.. Columns: CustomerID VARCHAR, CompanyName VARCHAR, ContactName VARCHAR, ContactTitle VARCHAR, Address VARCHAR, City VARCHAR, Region VARCHAR, PostalCode VARCHAR, Country VARCHAR, Phone VARCHAR, Fax VARCHAR
Table [Order Details]: Details of individual products within an order.. Columns: OrderID INT, ProductID INT, UnitPrice DECIMAL, Quantity SMALLINT, Discount DOUBLE

Table products: Information about products.. Columns: ProductID INT, ProductName VARCHAR, SupplierID INT, CategoryID INT, QuantityPerUnit VARCHAR, UnitPrice DECIMAL, UnitsInStock SMALLINT, UnitsOnOrder SMALLINT, ReorderLevel SMALLINT, Discontinued BIT

Table employees: Information about company employees.. Columns: EmployeeID INT, LastName VARCHAR, FirstName VARCHAR, Title VARCHAR, TitleOfCourtesy VARCHAR, BirthDate DATE, HireDate DATE, Address VARCHAR, City VARCHAR, Region VARCHAR, PostalCode VARCHAR, Country VARCHAR, HomePhone VARCHAR, Extension VARCHAR, Photo LONGBLOB, Notes MEDIUMTEXT, ReportsTo INT, PhotoPath VARCHAR, Salary FLOAT
Table shippers: Information about shipping companies.. Columns: ShipperID INT, CompanyName VARCHAR, Phone VARCHAR

Table suppliers: Information about product suppliers.. Columns: SupplierID INT, CompanyName VARCHAR, ContactName VARCHAR, ContactTitle VARCHAR, Address VARCHAR, City VARCHAR, Region VARCHAR, PostalCode VARCHAR, Country VARCHAR, Phone VARCHAR, Fax VARCHAR, HomePage MEDIUMTEXT
Table categories: Categories of products.. Columns: CategoryID INT, CategoryName VARCHAR, Description MEDIUMTEXT, Picture LONGBLOB
Table territories: Sales territories.. Columns: TerritoryID VARCHAR, TerritoryDescription VARCHAR, RegionID INT
Table employeeTerritories: Mapping of which employees cover which territories.. Columns: EmployeeID INT, TerritoryID VARCHAR
Table region: Different regions.. Columns: RegionID INT, RegionDescription VARCHAR
Table customerDemographics: Types of customer demographics.. Columns: CustomerTypeID VARCHAR, CustomerDesc MEDIUMTEXT
Table customerCustomerDemo: Linking table for customers and their demographics.. Columns: CustomerID VARCHAR, CustomerTypeID VARCHAR
Relationship: orders to customers — Orders are placed by customers using CustomerID.
Relationship: orders to employees — Orders are processed by employees using EmployeeID.
Relationship: orders to shippers — Orders are shipped by shippers using ShipVia as ShipperID.
Relationship: [Order Details] to orders — Each order can have multiple [Order Details], linked by OrderID.
Relationship: [Order Details] to products — Each order detail pertains to a single product, linked by ProductID.
Relationship: products to suppliers — Products are supplied by suppliers using SupplierID.
Relationship: products to categories — Products are categorized into categories using CategoryID.
Relationship: employeeTerritories to employees — Employees are assigned to territories, linked by EmployeeID.
Relationship: employeeTerritories to territories — Territories can have multiple employees, linked by TerritoryID.
Relationship: customerCustomerDemo to customers — Customers can belong to multiple demographics, linked by CustomerID.
Relationship: customerCustomerDemo to customerDemographics — Demographics can include multiple customers, linked by CustomerTypeID.
Scenario Customer Sales Analysis: Analyzing sales data by customer.. Rules: Revenue recognized on ShippedDate
Scenario Inventory Management: Managing product stock levels.. Rules: Restock when UnitsInStock less than ReorderLevel
Scenario Shipping Efficiency: Optimizing shipping routes for efficiency.. Rules: Optimize routes based on ShipRegion and ShipCountry
Scenario Employee Performance Tracking: Tracking employee order processing performance.. Rules: Performance evaluated on number of orders processed
Scenario Product Profitability: Calculating profitability of products.. Rules: Profit calculated as UnitPrice minus Discount
Scenario Customer Retention: Strategies to retain customers.. Rules: Follow-up if no orders in the past 12 months
Scenario Supplier Relationship Management: Managing supplier relationships.. Rules: Assess supplier performance based on delivery times and product quality
Scenario Market Segmentation: Segmenting the market based on customer demographics.. Rules: Segment customers based on CustomerDemographics
Scenario Sales Territory Performance: Evaluating sales performance by territory.. Rules: Sales targets set based on TerritoryDescription; Revenue recognized on ShippedDate
Scenario Product Category Sales Trends: Analyzing sales trends within product categories.. Rules: Analyze sales trends by CategoryName; Revenue recognized on ShippedDate
